name: Grub
description: A harmless subterranean insect that can only be unearthed with a shovel. It is an early source of Grub Sludge and Grub Hide, but it always forces the player to read the ground carefully.
behavior: It moves slowly underground and gives away its position with a moving trail of disturbed dirt and a clear burrowing sound. Once unearthed, it lies on its back for a few seconds before trying to burrow again.
interactionWithPlayer: You need an Acorn Shovel to force it out. Once on the surface it does not defend itself; it simply stays vulnerable until you kill it or it burrows again.
interactionWithCreatures: It barely interacts with other creatures because nothing else really digs it up. The important catch is that some larva mimic the same underground trail and can ambush the player in the wrong area.
strategy: Bring a shovel and hit it immediately once it pops out. If you are in an odd area or near larva territory, listen carefully: fake grubs usually sound deeper and warn you about an ambush.
